description_long: This is a large, freestanding coffee vending machine with a modern, rectangular design. The front panel features a digital display at the top, a set of tactile buttons and controls, and a large photographic graphic showing a cup of coffee and a woman, suggesting its function. Below the graphic is a dispensing area with a recessed compartment for cups and a circular dispensing nozzle. The sides are vented with horizontal slats for cooling, and the back is plain and unadorned. The machine is primarily white with black accents, and its robust build suggests it is intended for public or commercial use in urban environments.
description: A large, modern coffee vending machine with a digital control panel, cup dispenser, and prominent coffee-themed graphic on the front. The body is mostly white with black accents and vented sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital control panel, tactile buttons, large coffee-themed graphic, and dispensing area.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying vented slats for cooling and a mostly plain white surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned white panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view with vented slats, a few access panels, and black accenting.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front, featuring a digital display in the center, with tactile buttons and icons arranged to the left and right of the display.
